data.name: My State Sponsored Catgirl
data.detailed_description:
My State Sponsored Catgirl is an adult simulation game and visual novel. Dive into a sci-fi romance about a guy who mysteriously receives a catgirl from the government. Interact with Sophie, your new catgirl companion. Win her affection through food, headpats, and sex. Unlock new scenes. Explore the story to uncover the mysteries of Sophie's origins or just earn money to buy Sophie new outfits, toys, and food. Choose your fate and uncover the different endings with Sophie, your state sponsored catgirl.

Sophie

A naive and enthusiastic catgirl! Loves food. Loves headpats. Eager to please you!

The game features:

  • 100+ unique cg images

  • Lots of romance and sex scenes 

  • 2+ hours of story content

  • High quality animated scenes 

  • Fun minigames

  • Scene gallery

  • Meaningful choices and several unique endings

  • Steam achievements

  • Catgirl headpats!

data.short_description: My State Sponsored Catgirl is an animated adult simulation game and visual novel. Interact with Sophie your government issued catgirl to raise her affection for you and unlock new scenes. A sexy sci-fi mystery story with multiple endings and catgirls!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS 3.0 / Ubuntu 16+ / Debian 10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
